channel.title: LLMs on erik.wiffin
channel.description: Recent content in LLMs on erik.wiffin

item.title: 95% Cheaper, 75% Faster: Tuning an Agent with Pairwise Evals
item.description: Pointwise vs. Pairwise LLM Agent evals and how I used a custom eval tool to speed up my agent by 4x and cut costs by 95%.

item.title: You are Failing at AI Because You Haven’t Built a Learning Organization
item.description: LLMs have broken the traditional software playbook: demos are misleading, expertise is shifting too fast to hire for, and the conditions surrounding AI adoption are the worst possible for building the learning organization you actually need.

item.title: Your AI Agent is a Distributed System
item.description: Mid-way through building an agentic application, I got stuck. I found myself needing to make it work, make it right, and make it fast, all at once, and progress was slow. Reframing it as a distributed system helped me recognize where my problems were coming from and got me going again.

item.title: Building Chart Chat with Plan and Execute
item.description: Observability, tool design, and model selection are harder than the orchestration loop. Lessons from building an agentic charting tool with Plan and Execute.

item.title: AI Strategy & Implementation
item.description:
I provide AI strategy and implementation services. If you think I can help you, contact me at erik.wiffin@gmail.com.

Services

  • AI Strategy: I will work with you to help you define your company’s AI Strategy.
  • Zero to One: Proof of Concept Implementation: I will develop a proof of concept to validate a product idea or lay a foundation for your existing engineering team.
  • One to One Million: AI in production: I will provision the infrastructure required for you to run your AI in production, covering everything from hardware requirements, to logging and monitoring to prevent “model drift” over time.

Background

I’ve been working with language models since before they were large. In addition to over 15 years in the technology industry working mostly in product engineering, I have been experimenting with LLMs since the first ChatGPT and have an understanding of the space that I will use to ensure your project’s success.

item.title: Proof of Thought
item.description: With large language models capable of generating convincing documents without real thought, this insightful article explores the critical need for new “Proofs of Thought” to ensure genuine intellectual engagement and prevent workplace processes from becoming mere facades.
